title: Binalonan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Binalonan with a Z-Score of +3.43. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Binalonan are extreme, with a heat wave causing temperatures to soar. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relatively low wind speed of 7.7 km/h and high humidity of 76% are exacerbating the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
